channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Bwala lists FG’s strategies to end insurgency, kidnapping
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Daniel Bwala outlines the Federal Government’s comprehensive strategies to end insurgency, banditry, and kidnapping across Nigeria, including recruitment,
Read More: https://punchng.com/bwala-lists-fgs-strategies-to-end-insurgency-kidnapping/

item.title: Fubara condoles ex-Rivers governor Amaechi over mother’s death
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Rivers State Governor Fubara condoles ex-governor Amaechi on his mother’s passing, acknowledging her legacy and offering comfort during this difficult time
Read More: https://punchng.com/fubara-condoles-ex-rivers-governor-amaechi-over-mothers-death/

item.title: Substation explosion plunges parts of Enugu into blackout
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
An explosion at the Gariki Injection Substation has caused a widespread Enugu blackout, affecting numerous communities. MainPower is working to restore pow
Read More: https://punchng.com/substation-explosion-plunges-parts-of-enugu-into-blackout/

item.title: World Cup Final: Burna Boy, Shakira Reunite Ahead Of Halftime Show
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Nigerian Afrobeats superstar and Grammy Award-winning singer Burna Boy and Colombian music icon Shakira have reunited ahead of Sunday’s FIFA World Cup final. The duo was spotted sharing a lighthearted moment during rehearsals at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey, United States (U.S). Taking to his verif

item.title: Messi, Yamal in pole position for Ballon d’Or 2026 after World Cup heroics
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Former Spain midfielder Gaizka Mendieta has identified Argentina captain Lionel Messi and Spain's teenage sensation Lamine Yamal as the two leading candidates for the 2026 Ballon d’Or award.

item.title: Messi speaks on ‘prophetic’ Yamal photos
item.dc:creator: SportingLife NG
item.description: Argentina captain Lionel Messi says it is “crazy” to be facing Spain’s Lamine Yamal in Sunday’s World Cup final after being photographed with him as a baby. In 2007 Lamine Yamal’s parents won a charity photoshoot at Barcelona in which 20-year-old Messi held their five-m

item.title: Why Nigerian Money Market Funds are your best emergency fund upgrade
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: The Nigerian Money Market Fund (MMF) market is one to watch if you’re seeking competitive returns while keeping your capital safe and highly liquid. The post Why Nigerian Money Market Funds are your best emergency fund upgrade appeared first on Nairametrics.

item.description: The Commissioner of Police, Borno State Command, CP Naziru Abdulmajid described the practice as reckless, unprofessional, and dangerous. The post Police Warn Against Indiscriminate Gunfire By Armed Security Personnel appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: More games and more controversy - has World Cup been a success?
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: From high ticket prices to hydration breaks, new laws and political interventions, there has rarely been a dull moment at the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: Super Eagles Defender Nears Fulham Move
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Trabzonspor defender Chibuike Nwaiwu is closing in on a permanent move to Premier League side Fulham, Completesports.com reports. According to Sky Sport, Fulham have tabled a €27 million bid for the Nigerian centre-back, while Trabzonspor are holding out for €30 million. The two clubs are believed t

item.title: England carry ‘scars’ of World Cup exit, says Tuchel
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: "We didn't get the result, so I take, of course, the responsibility for these decisions. But the decisions are made under stress, the decisions are made in-game." The post England carry ‘scars’ of World Cup exit, says Tuchel appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: World Cup: Everything you need to know about England vs France match
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup third-place playoff will see England take on France in a battle for the bronze medal after both teams suffered semifinal defeats. The post World Cup: Everything you need to know about England vs France match appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: Activist calls for probe of Umahi over Mary Habila’s death
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Kogi-born political activist and public commentator, Comrade Usman Okai Austin, has called on the Inspector-General of Police (IGP), Olatunji Rilwan Disu, to ensure a thorough and transparent investigation into the death of 26-year-old physiotherapist, Mary Habila.

item.title: How Shakira and Burna Boy Are Preparing for the 2026 FIFA World Cup Halftime Show With The Ghetto Kids
item.dc:creator: BellaNaija
item.description: Since its establishment in 1930, no FIFA World Cup game or final has ever had a halftime show. Under the Laws of the Game set by the International Football Association Board (IFAB), which FIFA follows, players are entitled to a half-time interval that must not exceed 15 minutes. The rule emphasises

item.title: The strategic impact of leadership in dialing up business performance
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: Every organisation encounters challenges. Sometimes the challenges are so fundamental that they prompt difficult questions: How did we get here? What went wrong? Who did what, when, why and how? What happens next? In the midst of these questions, leadership becomes the defining factor between declin

item.title: FCT Getting Better Under Wike 50 Years After Creation —Tinubu
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has praised the performance of the Minister of the Federal Capital Territory (FCT), Nyesom Wike, saying Abuja is witnessing significant transformation under his leadership, 50 years after the creation of the nation’s capital. Tinubu made the remarks at a special thanksgiving di

item.title: Imo unapologetically a one party State — Gov Uzodimma
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: …Insists Tinubu stands on solid ground of performance for re-election in 2027 By Romanus Ugwu The governor of Imo State, Hope Uzodimma, has boasted that the state is unrepentantly a one party state to massive vote President Bola Tinubu in the next year’s presidential election. He spoke w

item.title: US Democrats divided over support for Israel ahead of midterm elections
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: US House Democrats were divided into a near-even split by a vote this week over whether to cut military aid to Israel, which was defeated through almost total opposition from the Republican party. Ahead of November's midterm elections, the vote reflects a sharp erosion in support for Israel among le

item.title: NBA Suspends Presidential Election After Cyberattack Hits Voting Platform
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Nigerian Bar Association (NBA) has suspended its 2026 presidential election following a cyberattack on its electronic voting platform just hours before voting was scheduled to begin. Voting was expected to commence at 12:00 a.m. on Saturday, July 18, but the Electoral Committee of the Nigerian B

item.description: Members at the maiden reunion of the University of Lagos Department of English Alumni (UDEA) have called on graduates to embrace lifelong learning and career adaptability, stating that a first degree does not limit the different type of professional paths available to them. item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has named Musa Zagi as its deputy governorship candidate in Kebbi State ahead of the 2027 governorship election. The appointment was announced on Friday in a statement signed by the party’s Publicity Secretary, Engr. Abubakar Atiku Musa, who said the nomin

item.description: Popular Afrobeats musician Abiola Ahmed Akinbiyi, widely known as Bella Shmurda, has denied viral reports claiming he lost $4 million in a Lagos property scam.   Social media reports had earlier claimed that the singer cried out for help during an Instagram Live session after allegedly being de

item.title: When Did Book Clubs Become the Coolest Place to Be?
item.dc:creator: YNaija
item.description: Lagos book clubs used to be small, insulated gatherings hidden away in quiet living rooms or university libraries. Today, they operate as high-visibility social fixtures on the urban cultural calendar, actively competing for attendance alongside art gallery openings and independent film screenings.

item.dc:creator: Premium Times

item.dc:creator: TechCabal
item.description: GoCab, the mobility fintech that operates Yango's largest fleet in Côte d'Ivoire, has handed over 100 fully electric cars to drivers in Abidjan.

The ruling restores the assets to the federal gove

item.title: Donald Trump blames Canada for smoke pollution
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: More than 800 wildfires are burning across Canada, including around 190 in northern Ontario, with the surge in fires widely linked to climate change. Thick smoke has created hazardous air quality not only across parts of Canada but also in several US states, including Minnesota, Illinois, Michigan a

The demonstrations entered a second day after the popular defence minister, Mykhailo Fedorov, was

item.description: Kuwait said on Saturday that an Iranian attack hit a water and electricity plant one day after a similar strike damaged another plant. item.title: Two Nigerians, accomplice jailed in UK over £5 million cryptocurrency fraud
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Two Nigerian nationals and a third accomplice have been sentenced to a combined 28 years and nine months in prison after orchestrating a sophisticated cryptocurrency fraud that defrauded victims of nearly £5 million. The convicts, Anthony Ikenwe, 29, Kevin Nwamma, 25, and Hamza Bashir, 23, were sent

item.description: More than 5,000 people were killed in the twin earthquakes that struck Venezuela last month, officials said, adding that the country would tap $346 million from the International Monetary Fund (IMF) for reconstruction. The coastal state of La Guaira, located north of Caracas, was decimated in the qu

item.title: Transmission connection: Gombe axis to experience blackout today
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: From Isaac Anumihe, Abuja People along Jos–Bauchi–Gombe 330kV transmission line will be thrown into unexpected darkness today (Saturday). According to Nigerian Independent System Operator (NISO), the outage is to enable the Transmission Company of Nigeria (TCN) carry out the connection of the Optica

item.title: How five-year-old girl spent eight days in captivity before police rescue
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: •I was cheated by my gang member on ransom paid —Suspect A suspected kidnapper, Seyi, arrested by operatives of the Anti-Kidnapping Squad (AKS) in Oyo State Police Command, has told of how one Alaba, his partner in crime, who is currently at large, convinced him to join a kidnap operation but cheate

item.title: Perfection Lyrics by Tobe Nwigwe & Flavour Feat. C.S. Armstrong
item.dc:creator: NotJustOk
item.description: Tobe Nwigwe, Flavour and C.S. Armstrong Lyrics Perfection by Tobe Nwigwe featuring Flavour and C.S. Armstrong is a soulful celebration of love, admiration, and devotion, the lyrics express deep appreciation for a romantic partner, highlighting their beauty, character, and the unique connection they

item.title: Kuwait says Iran hit second power, water plant
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Kuwait on Saturday said Iran struck another of its power and water plants, leading to the deactivation of several power generation units, a day after a similar attack. The post Kuwait says Iran hit second power, water plant appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Ebola: BVD outbreak in DRC remains active with 2,124 cases
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: As of 15 July 2026, a cumulative total of 2,124 confirmed cases, including 828 deaths, have been reported from the DRC. The post Ebola: BVD outbreak in DRC remains active with 2,124 cases appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: ‎DJ Timmy Accuses Timi Dakolo Of Owing Him Money, Shares Receipts
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: ‎Nigerian disc jockey DJ Timmy has called out singer Timi Dakolo for allegedly owing him money. ‎In an Instagram post, he said that Wednesday made it exactly one month since he begged him to archive his post, and yet he hasn’t paid him back. ‎He threatened that if by Monday 20th, the money hasn’t h

item.title: Kuwait Faces Intense Night of Iranian Attacks as Power Plant Hit
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Kuwait suffered one of its worst nights of Iranian retaliatory attacks since the conflict in the Middle East began, with a second power plant hit in as many days and flights suspended.

item.title: From baby bath to World Cup final: True story behind Messi, Yamal’s viral photo
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Uncover the true story behind the viral photo of Lionel Messi bathing baby Lamine Yamal, now set to face off in the 2026 World Cup final. Was it AI? Find o
Read More: https://punchng.com/from-baby-bath-to-world-cup-final-true-story-behind-messi-yamals-viral-photo/

item.title: Residents flee Ikorodu community after robberies, killing of CDA executive
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: "The robbers damaged the CCTV camera, forced the door open and made away with valuables. They attempted to strike the owner on the head with a machete" The post Residents flee Ikorodu community after robberies, killing of CDA executive appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: FRSC Bill against preaching: Northern Christian Elders urge Tinubu to withhold assent
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Northern States Christian Elders Forum (NOSCEF) has rejected a provision in the proposed Federal Road Safety Corps (FRSC) Act (Amendment) Bill, 2026, which reportedly prescribes a ₦50,000 fine for individuals found preaching in commercial buses, describing it as a threat to constitutionally guar

item.title: Reps vow robust legislative support for insurance sector
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: By Henry Uche The Chairman of the House of Representatives Committee on Insurance and Actuarial Matters, Hon. Ahmadu Usman Jaha, has reaffirms the National Assembly’s commitment to strengthening Nigeria’s insurance industry through legislation aimed at improving regulation, consumer prot

item.title: My monthly period saved me from being raped after attack by armed Bororo Fulani, victim narrates
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Buba Abdullahi, Abubakar Jabi, Momodu Sheu and Bello Umar are between 20 and 25 years old. They are of Bororo extraction and worked as herdsmen for cattle owners in Oyo Town, Oyo State. Looking at their youthful faces, one would hardly imagine the brutality they allegedly unleashed. But behind the s

item.title: ‎Davido, IK Ogbonna, Others Turn Up For Ubi Franklin’s Son 10th Birthday Party
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Former couple Lilian Esoro and Ubi Franklin are currently making waves online as they reunite to celebrate their son’s birthday. Celebrities like Davido, Ik Ogbonna, among others, showed up at the birthday party. Their son turned 10 today, and taking the lead, Lilian shared photos of her cute son, s

item.title: Anambra court sentences two to death for rape, murder of 17-yr-old
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The judge condemned the acts of the convicts, describing them as a violation that demanded accountability and had desecrated societal values. The post Anambra court sentences two to death for rape, murder of 17-yr-old appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Trump threatens to increase Canada tariffs over wildfire smoke pollution
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: US President Donald Trump threatened on Friday a tariff increase on Canada to cover the cost of smoke pollution from wildfires that have choked large parts of the United States. The post Trump threatens to increase Canada tariffs over wildfire smoke pollution appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Amazon’s ‘God of War’ to Recast Lead Actor After Injury
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Production on Amazon’s upcoming God of War television series has run into a major setback following a severe injury to the lead actor, Ryan Hurst.   Hurst, who was cast to play the iconic character Kratos in the live-action video game adaptation, reportedly tore his bicep during a stunt s
